channel.title: Containers on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Containers on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: What’s new for .NET in Ubuntu 26.04
item.description:
Ubuntu 26.04 ships with .NET 10. The post explains how to install .NET 10 from the Ubuntu archive, use the new -resolute container tags, build Native AOT apps, and install .NET 8 and 9 from the dotnet-backports PPA.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 3 is now available!
item.description:
Microsoft announced .NET 11 Preview 3, covering updates across the runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, and container images. The provided excerpt does not include specific feature details.

  • Source: .NET
